fields.shortDescription: In this strategic team-based event, participants compete to build the ultimate anime roster through quizzes and a high-stakes auction. Teams must manage budgets and follow specific drafting rules to create balanced lineups, with winners determined by rost
fields.longDescription: Anime Auction: Battle of Builds is a team-based strategy event where participants compete to build the ultimate anime character lineup. Teams first play a short quiz round to earn bonus points and narrow down the competition. In the main auction round, each team receives an equal budget and bids on characters from different anime and genres, each with a preset rating. Teams must plan carefully to meet mandatory “hard rules” for their roster (such as minimum number of characters, required female characters, and villains), while also considering “soft rules” like team roles (leader, support, tank, etc.). In the final round, teams present their character setups, and scores are calculated from roster strength, quiz bonuses, and efficient budget use.

fields.shortDescription: This event features a series of literature and pop-culture-themed games for solo and team participants. Challenges include creating book interpretations, identifying portmanteaus, analyzing plot holes, and engaging in word-based puzzles and quote-matching
fields.longDescription:
The event consists of an amalgamation of small games, all themed around literature and pop culture. It's open to both solo and team participants. 
1) Book Cover Balderdash- Creating our own interpretation of obscure book plots based on their covers 
2) BookBookMovie- Identifying a portmanteau (consisting of 1 book title and 1 movie) based of cryptic hints 
3) Plot Hole- Identify and elaborate on a plot hole in a book or show of your choice, convincing the audience of how it ruins the story entirely. 
4) Monikers- A chit gets pulled, the team member has to describe it in 4 words, they keep 
moving to the next chit until the time runs out. The same clue will be used in the next round, but they can only describe it in 2 words, in the final round they can only use actions. 
5) Pin the quote- Similar to pint the tail on the donkey, there will be half quotes on a wall and a bunch of options attached to pins spread around, the participant must pin the right half to the wall.

fields.shortDescription: Presented by the Quiz Club, this fast-paced general knowledge quiz covers everything from international news to viral internet trends. Participants face unpredictable rounds spanning science, sports, and pop culture, testing their quick reactions and broa
fields.longDescription:
Get ready for a quiz that pulls questions from every corner of the world and every corner of the internet. Everything, Everywhere, All at Once is a fast, fun and unpredictable general knowledge event that mixes international news, science, sports, pop culture, history, tech, entertainment and even a bit of hot gossip.

If it happened, trended, went viral, or made people talk, it might show up here. The rounds are designed to keep everyone on their toes, with a mix of serious questions, light moments and a few surprises to keep the energy high.

Whether you follow global affairs, binge movies, scroll through social media all day, or simply love random facts, this quiz has something for you. Bring your best thinking, your quickest reactions and a team that can keep up with the chaos.

Everything, Everywhere, All at Once
Presented by the Quiz Club of VIT Chennai.

The top-performing teams from the video screening will then advance to the on-stage finale, where they will perform live in front of an audience. The event celebrates the power of teamwork, artistic expression, and performance, offering teams a platform to display their hard work, creativity, and stage presence.

fields.longDescription: The Dance Club of VIT Chennai presents Clash of Crews, an intercollegiate team dance competition designed to test creativity, adaptability, and stage presence. Crews will perform under pressure, face unpredictable challenges, and showcase their versatility through multiple rounds. Only the most coordinated and dynamic team will emerge as champions.

fields.shortDescription: Palette Roulette is a solo art competition where participants receive a mystery box containing random artistic mediums and a musical instrument image. Artists must create an original piece following the theme “Live the Beats,” meaningfully incorporating t
fields.longDescription:
“Palette Roulette” is a solo sketching and painting competition where each participant will receive a mystery box at the beginning of the event. The mystery box will contain a random set of colouring and sketching mediums, such as graphite pencils, colour pencils, acrylic paints, charcoal, etc., along with an image of a musical instrument.
Participants are required to create an original artwork that revolves around the musical instrument provided, ensuring its meaningful inclusion in the final composition. The artwork should interpret the theme “Live the Beats”.

fields.shortDescription: Crescendo is a Western solo singing competition featuring English-language performances. After an online preliminary round, shortlisted vocalists perform live, with judging focused on technique, pitch, and stage presence. While instrumental accompaniment
fields.longDescription:
Crescendo- Western Vocals is a solo singing competition designed to highlight vocal talent through English-language performances. The event features two stages: an online preliminary round where participants submit their recordings, and a live final round for shortlisted performers. Registration for each participant is Rs.250.
Finalists may sing with or without instrumental or karaoke accompaniment, though only the vocal performance will be judged. Backing tracks must be instrumental-only and submitted in advance. Each performer is given a maximum of five minutes on stage, and exceeding this limit will result in deductions.
Judging focuses on vocal technique, pitch accuracy, rhythm, stage presence, song choice, creativity, and overall impact. Any form of vulgarity will lead to immediate disqualification, and the judges’ decision will be final and binding.

fields.shortDescription: Polyphony is a Western Battle of Bands for college groups performing in English. Following an online preliminary round, finalists perform live on stage, emphasizing originality and synchronization without backing tracks. Bands must bring their own instrum
fields.longDescription: Polyphony - Western Battle of Bands is a competitive platform for college bands to showcase their musical talent through live English performances. Bands (4-9 members) will participate in an online preliminary round, followed by an on-stage finale for shortlisted teams. The event emphasizes originality, creativity, synchronization, and stage presence, with strict no-backing-track rules to maintain performance authenticity. Finalists will be given a defined stage time and must bring their own instruments (drum kit provided). Registration is Rs.300 per member for bands qualifying for the final round. Decisions by the judging panel will be final.

fields.shortDescription: Akaar is a solo singing competition dedicated to the beauty of regional music. Participants undergo an online screening before performing in a live finale. Evaluations focus on vocal technique, rhythm, and expression, with finalists given five minutes to
fields.longDescription:
Akaar- Eastern Vocals is a solo singing competition celebrating the richness of regional music through expressive and technically strong performances. The event follows an online preliminary round where participants submit their recordings, and a live final round for shortlisted performers. Each participant registers with a fee of Rs.250.
Finalists may perform with or without instrumental or karaoke accompaniment; however, only the vocal performance will be evaluated. Backing tracks must be instrumental-only and submitted in advance. Each performer is allotted a maximum of five minutes on stage, with deductions for exceeding the time limit.
Judging will focus on vocal technique, pitch and intonation, rhythm, creativity, song choice, stage presence, and overall impact. Any form of vulgarity will result in immediate disqualification, and the judges’ decision will be final and binding.

fields.shortDescription: Aakriti celebrates regional musical heritage through an Eastern Battle of Bands. Student groups compete in online preliminaries before selected teams advance to live finals. Performances must be in regional languages and strictly acoustic, focusing on cre
fields.longDescription:
Aakriti - Eastern Battle of Bands is a curated platform that celebrates regional musical heritage through powerful live band performances. Student bands with 4-9 members will compete first in an online preliminary round, after which selected teams will advance to the on-stage finals. The event maintains performance authenticity by requiring all pieces to be in regional languages and strictly prohibiting backing tracks.
Finalists will perform within a defined 20-minute stage slot, ensuring consistency and smooth event flow. Bands must bring their own instruments, with a drum kit made available by the organizers. Judging will emphasize creativity, originality, synchronization, uniqueness, and overall stage presence. Any form of vulgarity will lead to immediate disqualification, and the judging panel’s decision will be final.

fields.shortDescription: Battle Arena is a high-energy solo freestyle competition presented by VIT Chennai’s Dance Club. Dancers face off in head-to-head battles, relying on spontaneous movement and raw skill rather than choreography to demonstrate their creativity, rhythm, and s
fields.longDescription: The Dance Club of VIT Chennai presents Battle Arena, an intense solo freestyle dance competition designed to test creativity, rhythm, adaptability, and stage presence. Participants will engage in high-energy, head-to-head dance battles where spontaneous movement and raw skill determine the winner. There is no choreography and no second chances—only pure talent on display.

fields.shortDescription: The Campus Photo Contest invites participants to capture campus life and nature through photography within college grounds. Selected entries are featured on social media, where winners are determined by public voting, encouraging students to express their
fields.longDescription:
The Campus Photo Contest is a fun and creative event where participants capture photos only inside the college campus. The aim is to showcase campus life, nature, and creativity through photography.
All selected photos will be posted on the official social media page, and winners will be decided based on online voting (likes). Let your creativity speak through your lens!

fields.shortDescription: This horror-themed escape room challenges participants to solve film-related riddles and puzzles to find their way out. Players must navigate through various obstacles and ghostly encounters, blending the thrills of a haunted house with intellectual chall
fields.longDescription: This event is set up in a horror theme where participants have to solve puzzles in order to escape the horror room. It blends horror house and riddles and puzzles relating to films to be solved so that they advance and find a way out despite the obstacles put out by the ghosts in the room.

fields.shortDescription: Nukkad Natak is an energetic inter-college street play competition focused on social, cultural, and political issues. Teams perform original plays in public spaces, using raw energy and rhythm to spread awareness, inspire change, and engage the audience t
fields.longDescription:
Nukkad Natak is a powerful form of street theatre that brings stories, emotions, and social
messages directly to the people. This inter-college street play competition invites teams from various colleges to showcase their acting, creativity, and voice for change. Each team will perform an original or adapted play addressing social, cultural, or political issues that
resonate with today’s youth. The event aims to spread awareness, inspire thought, and
entertain through impactful performances filled with energy, rhythm, and dialogue. Judging
will be based on theme relevance, acting, coordination, creativity, and audience engagement.
It’s not just about performing it’s about making people think, feel, and act. Come witness
drama in its rawest, most vibrant form as streets turn into stages and voices turn into
revolutions.

fields.shortDescription: Style-A-Thon is a collaborative fashion competition where teams of stylists, models, and photographers interpret a specific theme. Participants are judged on clothing design, runway presentation, and stage presence, offering a creative platform to push fa
fields.longDescription: Style-A-Thon, organized by the Designers Club of VIT Chennai, is a dynamic fashion show competition that celebrates creativity, collaboration, and storytelling through style. Teams comprising stylists, models, and photographers work together to conceptualize outfits, present them on the runway, and capture striking visuals. For each edition of the event, a specific theme is structured and provided to all participating teams, which they are required to interpret, embrace, and showcase through their clothing designs, styling choices, and runway presentation. The event evaluates participants on styling, stage presence, ramp walk, thematic relevance, and visual presentation, along with audience engagement on social media. Held exclusively during Vibrance for the past four editions, Style-A-Thon has grown into one of the most celebrated and anticipated events of the fest. It offers a platform for students to push creative boundaries, experiment with innovative silhouettes and textures, and translate abstract concepts into compelling fashion narratives. With structured rehearsals, professional evaluation, and an energetic runway experience, the event stands as a flagship fashion showcase on campus.

fields.shortDescription: Chameleon is a solo monoacting challenge testing a performer's ability to shift characters and emotions instantly. Without props or technical aids, participants must demonstrate versatility through voice, body language, and narrative control to captivate
fields.longDescription: Chameleon is a solo monoacting event that tests a performer’s ability to shift characters, emotions, and scenarios instantly. Participants take the stage alone and deliver a dynamic, high-impact performance where they must adapt like a chameleon—switching voices, expressions, body language, and narrative tones with precision. The piece can be dramatic, comedic, or abstract, but must clearly showcase versatility, control, and stage presence. The focus is on transformational acting, creativity, and the performer’s ability to hold the audience’s attention without any supporting cast, props, or technical aids.

fields.shortDescription: Fuyumatsuri is an anime and cosplay festival celebrating Japanese pop culture through a flagship cosplay competition and various interactive stalls. Featuring games, art, and mini-tournaments, the event provides an inclusive space for fans to express thei
fields.longDescription: Fuyumatsuri is a one-day anime and cosplay festival conducted by Anime Realm as part of Vibrance, celebrating Japanese pop culture, creativity, and community on campus. The flagship event is a cosplay competition where participants come on stage, introduce their characters, and perform in character, with winners decided through a combination of judges’ scores and audience response. Alongside the stage events, the venue will host 10 or more unique anime-themed stalls featuring games, quizzes, art, interactive experiences, and mini-tournaments such as Beyblade battles and an anime drawing competition, ensuring continuous engagement throughout the day. The event aims to provide a safe and inclusive space for self-expression, encourage student collaboration across departments, and create memorable experiences for both seasoned anime fans and newcomers. Building on the success and strong participation of last year’s edition, this iteration of Fuyumatsuri seeks to be bigger, more interactive, and even more vibrant.

fields.shortDescription: This hands-on workshop invites literature enthusiasts to create personalized mini-magazines, or zines. Participants engage in writing, doodling, and collaging to express their creative identity, exploring literary themes through art and leaving with a cus
fields.longDescription:
An event where literary themes find artistic expression. A mini-magaZine making workshop for literature enthusiasts and creative minds alike! 
Participants get to engage in a hands-on session where they can write, doodle, collage, annotate and create their own mini magazine. 
Zines are a powerful instrument for self-expression and creative identity similar to literature, and by the end of the workshop, each participant gets to walk away with their very own, personalized Zine!

fields.shortDescription: Participants work in teams to escape classrooms converted into themed environments by solving literary clues. Featuring themes like murder mysteries, Harry Potter, and Greek mythology, this immersive event challenges groups to use logic and literature kno
fields.longDescription:
Classrooms will be turned into Escape rooms, where participants will go in as teams and try to escape the room by solving the series of literary clues provided to them.
Themes:
Murder mystery. Solve the murder mystery to get out or get killed by the killer.
Stranger things/Dungeons and dragons
Harry Potter
Medieval themed
Greek/Roman mythology

fields.shortDescription: This IPL Auction event begins with a cricket quiz to shortlist top contenders, who then form teams to participate in a realistic bidding simulation. Using a fixed virtual budget, teams strategically bid for players across categories to build the ultimate
fields.longDescription: The IPL Auction event will begin with registration of all participants, followed by a short cricket quiz to test knowledge and shortlist the top 40 contenders. From these, 10 team owners will be selected, and each owner will form a 4-member team. Once teams are finalized, the main auction will begin where each team, with a fixed virtual budget, bids on players from different categories to build their squad, just like in the real IPL auction. The auctioneer will announce players, manage bids, and track team budgets until all squads are complete. The event will conclude with announcing the best team selections.

fields.shortDescription: This event features a five-round quiz centered on Telugu culture, encompassing language, history, scriptures, and predominantly cinema. Designed to be both entertaining and educational, it offers students a platform to build social skills, share experienc
fields.longDescription:
The event will feature a five-round quiz covering the Telugu Culture including the Language, History, Scriptures and besides that Majority of the Quiz revolves around Cinema. 
The Objective of this event is to gather students in participation of an entertaining event and an to enlighten their evening alongside the hype of the Vibrance later on. The event intends to be both enjoyable and meaningful through helping the students build social skills, share experiences and to make a lasting memory within the lively atmosphere during the event with the rest of its community.

fields.shortDescription: Showcase your talent in the Western Solo Dance Competition! Participants have two to three minutes to impress judges with their individual skills, creativity, and moves while competing against fellow dancers in a high-energy environment focused on persona
fields.longDescription: Unleash your moves in our Western Solo Dance Competition! With 2-3 minutes to shine, show off your skills and creativity while competing against the best.

fields.shortDescription: This internal group dance competition combines storytelling with movement to depict narrative themes. Teams use creative expression and character portrayal to bring scenarios like social issues to life, fostering teamwork and emotional communication throu
fields.longDescription: Dancing Drama is an internal group dance competition that blends storytelling with movement. Each team will present a concept-based performance where narrative, expression, and choreography come together to depict a theme or storyline. The event encourages creativity, character portrayal, teamwork, and the ability to communicate emotions through dance. With a focus on dramatic expression and narrative flow, the stage becomes a canvas where teams bring stories and real life scenarios and depictions (eg: Poverty, Transgender Rights) to life through rhythm, formation, synchronization, and performance depth.

fields.shortDescription: Presented by the VITSOL Debate Society, this mystery-driven event blends Riverdale’s pop-culture world with academic debate and deduction. Teams of two participate in three rounds involving quick thinking, narrative analysis, and persuasive storytelling t
fields.longDescription:
Presented by VITSOL Debate Society (DEBSOC), Riverdale Reckonings is a thrilling mystery-driven cultural-academic event that blends pop-culture storytelling with debate, deduction, and quick thinking, straight out of the morally grey world of Riverdale. Participate in teams of two and compete across multiple exciting rounds:
1. One Minute at Pop’s: Speak for a minute on Riverdale-law-mystery topics without hesitation, repetition, or deviation.
2. The Blue & Gold Critique Panel: Watch a short Riverdale clip and break it down with sharp character, ethical, and narrative analysis.
3. Situation. Truth. Dare. — Riverdale Edition: Get a confidential crime-style brief and craft a convincing narrative to persuade the jury.

If you love drama, suspense, analysis, and mind games — welcome to Riverdale Reckonings.

fields.shortDescription: PrashnaManjusha celebrates Marathi literature and cultural heritage through an interactive journey of stories, poetry, and traditions. From the Bhakti era to modern cinema, participants engage in challenges and rapid-fire rounds designed to foster pride i
fields.longDescription:
PrashnaManjusha is a vibrant celebration of Marathi literature and culture, curated to engage enthusiasts with the richness of Maharashtra’s legacy. This interactive event brings together stories, poetry, folk traditions, historical milestones, and iconic literary works that have shaped Marathi identity. Participants journey through centuries of creative expression, from the saint-poets of the Bhakti era to modern Marathi writers, theatre, cinema, and cultural customs that define everyday life.

Designed for learners, admirers, and the culturally curious, PrashnaManjusha offers a dynamic blend of thoughtful challenges, rapid-fire segments, and theme-based rounds. It encourages participants to rediscover forgotten gems, explore linguistic beauty, and appreciate the diversity of rituals, art forms, and regional influences across Maharashtra.

More than a competition, PrashnaManjusha aims to inspire pride in Marathi heritage and foster deeper connections with its timeless literature and cultural traditions, making it an enriching and memorable experience for all.

fields.shortDescription: This energetic, hands-on workshop introduces participants to the traditional dhol rhythms of Maharashtra. Attendees move beyond listening to actively learning authentic drumming techniques, connecting with the communal spirit and vibrant pulse that define
fields.longDescription: Dhol Workshop is an energetic, hands-on experience designed to introduce participants to the powerful rhythms and vibrant cultural spirit of Maharashtra’s traditional dhol. This immersive session takes you beyond simply listening—inviting you to feel the pulse, learn authentic techniques, and connect with the communal energy that defines dhol performances.

fields.shortDescription: Campus Quest is an immersive treasure hunt where teams navigate a fantasy-styled campus map to find hidden checkpoints. By completing side quests and collecting coordinate fragments, participants work together to solve problems and race toward a final tre
fields.longDescription:
Campus Quest is an immersive treasure hunt where teams explore a fantasy-styled version of the campus using creatively morphed maps. Buildings and landmarks appear as volcanoes, oceans, castles, and other imaginative terrains, making navigation engaging and challenging. Each map contains five main checkpoints marked with an “X.” Reaching a checkpoint grants points, provides an official seal, and unlocks side quests available in that region. Each checkpoint also gives one fragment of the coordinates needed to discover the final treasure location.

Side quests are optional competitive challenges where two teams face off for bonus points, encouraging strategy and interaction. After collecting all coordinate fragments, teams race to the final location to earn high-value points that determine their final standing.

The event promotes teamwork, problem-solving, creativity, and campus exploration while offering an exciting, story-driven adventure experience for all participants

fields.eventName: The Case Files – A Murder Mystery Challenge
fields.shortDescription: In this interactive murder mystery, teams act as investigators analyzing evidence folders to solve a fictional crime. By uncovering motives and connections through documents and objects, participants unlock deeper case layers. Success depends on accurate
fields.longDescription:
Overview:
The Case Files is an interactive murder-mystery event where teams act as investigative units tasked with solving a fictional crime. Each team receives a detailed case folder containing letters, newspaper clippings, journal entries, objects, and other evidence fragments.

Mechanics:
Teams analyze every document to uncover connections, motives, timelines, and inconsistencies.

As they propose deductions or answer key questions, they unlock additional evidence files that reveal deeper layers of the case.

Progress depends entirely on the accuracy of their deductions, encouraging careful reasoning and teamwork.

Objective:
Teams must reconstruct what happened, identify the culprit, and provide a coherent explanation of the crime based on the evidence trail. The team with the most accurate and complete deduction wins.

fields.shortDescription: Desi Arcade is a vibrant campus event featuring handmade, old-school games like musical chairs and giant snakes & ladders. Drawing huge crowds, this nostalgic experience offers interactive, low-cost fun while showcasing the club's creativity and teamwork
fields.longDescription: Desi Arcade is a vibrant, crowd-pulling event where students jump into fun, interactive old-school childhood games like musical chairs, table-top challenges, giant snakes & ladders, and more. Our club designs and builds all the décor and game setups ourselves, giving the event a unique, handmade feel. Over the past two years, Desi Arcade has consistently drawn huge footfall, attracting students from across the campus as they pass through AB3. It’s an open, lively space where friends gather, relive nostalgia, compete, and enjoy quick, engaging activities. Although the registration fee is minimal, the high participation comfortably covers the event costs. Desi Arcade not only boosts campus energy but also showcases our club’s creativity and teamwork

fields.shortDescription: Made By You offers students a relaxing space to explore their artistic side through guided canvas painting. With all materials provided, participants are free to create unique artworks in a supportive environment, ultimately taking home their own self-mad
fields.longDescription: Made By You is a fun, creative event designed to let students explore their artistic side. The event provides participants with a calm, creative space to unwind and express themselves through guided yet open-ended canvas painting. All materials—canvases, paints, and brushes—are provided, making the experience accessible for both beginners and experienced artists. Participants get the freedom to paint anything they imagine while enjoying a relaxed, supportive environment that encourages creativity and connection. Each attendee leaves with a self-made artwork and a memorable creative experience.

fields.shortDescription: Inspired by popular survival series, this multi-stage game challenges students through four levels of increasing difficulty. Focusing on strategy, teamwork, and quick thinking, the event provides an immersive, competitive environment during Vibrance, enco
fields.longDescription: This event is an interactive, multi-stage game inspired by series like Alice in Borderland and Squid Game, adapted for a fun, low-budget university setting. Participants will progress through four different levels of challenges, each focusing on a different skill set such as strategy, teamwork, observation, and quick thinking. As they clear each stage, the difficulty and tension will increase, while still ensuring a safe, inclusive, and entertaining environment. Conducted during the Vibrance, this event aims to engage students in a unique, immersive experience that encourages collaboration, problem-solving, and friendly competition.

fields.shortDescription: This hands-on workshop introduces participants to acrylic pouring and fluid art techniques, fostering empowerment and self-expression. Open to all skill levels, the inclusive session encourages creativity and emotional well-being, allowing attendees to cr
fields.longDescription: The Fluid Art Workshop is a hands-on creative session designed to introduce participants to the fundamentals of acrylic pouring and abstract fluid techniques, while fostering a supportive space aligned with Girl Up’s values of empowerment and self-expression. This workshop encourages participants to explore colour, motion, and creativity without judgement, reinforcing the idea that every voice—and every artwork—holds its own unique strength. Attendees will learn key concepts such as colour mixing, composition, and controlled flow methods, all while engaging in a collaborative, calming activity that promotes confidence and emotional well-being. All materials will be provided, and no prior art experience is required. By the end of the session, participants will take home a personalised fluid art piece that reflects their individuality. This event aims to build community, spark creativity, and provide a safe, inclusive space for participants to unwind, connect, and create together.

fields.shortDescription: Escape the Boardroom is an immersive leadership challenge where teams solve corporate puzzles involving ethics, crisis management, and conflict resolution. This engaging escape room simulates real-world business pressures, helping participants develop cri
fields.longDescription:
“Escape the Boardroom” is an immersive, leadership-themed escape room designed to help participants experience real corporate decision-making under pressure. The activity places teams inside a simulated “boardroom crisis,” where they must solve a sequence of business-based puzzles to escape within 45 minutes. Each stage represents a leadership challenge—ethics, crisis communication, time management, conflict resolution, and vision building.

Teams of 2-4 players move through 3–5 themed “locks.” For example, they analyze HR clues to solve an ethical dilemma, draft a PR response during a crisis, prioritize tasks under a strict deadline, match conflict-resolution strategies to different personality types, and reconstruct the company’s mission from fragmented documents. These challenges require teamwork, clear communication, problem-solving, and quick, responsible decision-making.

Scoring is based on time taken, correctness of decisions, and teamwork as observed by facilitators. The event is easy to set up using printed clues, role cards, whiteboards, and a Game Master.

Overall, Escape the Boardroom offers a fun, high-impact learning experience that builds leadership qualities, strengthens collaboration, and simulates real-world pressures in an engaging way.

fields.shortDescription: Beaded Bonds is a creative, craft-based event where students design and exchange personalized friendship bracelets. Providing all necessary materials and guidance, this interactive session offers a relaxed space for collaboration and connection, allowing
fields.longDescription: Beaded Bonds is an interactive, fun, craft-based event designed to encourage creativity, collaboration, and meaningful connection among students. The setup features organized trays of beads, threads, and accessories, allowing participants to design and create personalized friendship bracelets. Simple instruction cards will be provided to guide beginners through basic knotting and beading techniques, making sure the event is accessible to all. It encourages pairs or groups of friends to sit together, craft bracelets, and exchange them as a symbol of friendship. This event offers a relaxed, colorful, and engaging space where students can create keepsakes while building bonds.

fields.shortDescription: Quizzipedia is a fast-paced event celebrating internet culture, featuring trivia on viral memes, deep Wikipedia rabbit holes, and tech history. Designed for digital citizens, this chaotic quiz challenges participants' knowledge of online trends and niche
fields.longDescription:
Welcome to Quizzipedia, a quiz built for the modern internet explorer. This event dives into everything that makes the online world chaotic, funny, surprising and endlessly fascinating.

Expect questions inspired by viral moments, deep Wikipedia rabbit holes, forgotten fandom lore, brainrot memes, internet history, niche communities, tech culture and all the obscure trivia you only learn at 3 a.m. while scrolling. If the internet has touched it, confused it or obsessed over it, Quizzipedia will probably cover it.

The rounds are fast, unpredictable and packed with references that only true internet citizens will understand. Whether you live on Reddit, binge YouTube documentaries, fall into Wikipedia spirals, collect memes, or just know way too much random information, this quiz is designed for you.

Quizzipedia celebrates everything the internet has created, ruined or made weird.
Join in for a fun and chaotic trip across the digital universe.

Quizzipedia: The Internet Quiz
Presented by the Quiz Club of VIT Chennai.

fields.shortDescription: This booth offers instant solo or group prints with a themed backdrop. A structured workflow with payment tokens and queue management ensures a smooth experience. Volunteers assist with posing and film management to provide visitors with lasting memories.
fields.longDescription: The Polaroid Photobooth will provide participants with instant printed Polaroid photos, offering both solo and group options. The booth setup includes a themed backdrop, props, lighting, and a payment desk. Participants will first be guided to the payment counter, where they select their photo type and receive a token. A queue manager ensures smooth flow while the photographer assists with posing and captures the shots. Prints are carefully developed and handed over by a dedicated volunteer. Throughout the event, the team will track film usage, manage crowds, and maintain equipment safety. The workflow ensures fast processing, organized coordination, and a memorable photo experience for all visitors.

fields.shortDescription: Inspired by the traditions of Kutchh, this cultural showcase features interactive workshops in pottery and embroidery alongside games and live performances. Participants can engage in guided Garba sessions and regional crafts, creating an immersive, energ
fields.longDescription: Immersion: The Rann Experience is a vibrant cultural showcase inspired by the rich artistic traditions of the Rann of Kutchh. The event brings together a curated blend of interactive workshops, creative activities, and live performances to offer participants a hands-on cultural journey. Visitors can explore pottery sessions, embroidery corners, and other craft experiences that highlight regional artistry and allow them to create their own take-home pieces. A series of engaging games adds a fun, competitive element, encouraging participation from students across the campus. Throughout the event, cultural performances and themed showcases will run at intervals, creating an energetic and immersive atmosphere. Additionally, guided Garba workshops will give participants a chance to learn and enjoy one of the region’s most iconic dance forms. Immersion aims to offer an inclusive, lively space where students can engage, learn, and celebrate culture together.

fields.shortDescription: Indian-themed haunted house with a storyline and darkened rooms. Teams of five use torches to find clues while navigating jump scares and live actors. This interactive event blends haunts with escape room elements for a thrilling, suspenseful experience.
fields.longDescription: The event is an Indian-themed haunted house built around an engaging storyline. Participants enter with a time limit (of about five minutes) in teams and move through a sequence of darkened rooms created using black partitions. There are a lot of realistic props (like spider webs, kitchen setup, etc) placed. Each team is given a torch and must search the space for clues that help them progress. The environment is low-lit to build suspense with live actrs, roaming characters and jump scares. As the team moves ahead, they must stay alert, and piece together the clues while navigating unexpected scares. The overall event combines the thrill of a haunted house with elements of story and escape rooms. Hence being interactive and exciting to join.

fields.shortDescription: Tentkotta celebrates cinema nostalgia by screening iconic films to recreate the magic of old theaters. This immersive experience focuses on collective memories and legendary performances, inviting participants to reconnect with the joy of classic cinema.
fields.longDescription: Tentkotta is a celebration of nostalgia, an event designed to bring back the timeless joy of cinema that shaped our memories. Through the screening of iconic films, Tentkotta recreates the warmth of watching movies together, just like the golden days of single-screen theatres and childhood evenings filled with laughter, emotions, and unforgettable scenes. This event is not just about films; it is about reconnecting with moments that made us fall in love with cinema. From memorable dialogues and legendary performances to soul-stirring music and visuals, Tentkotta offers an immersive experience that bridges generations. The screenings are curated to evoke emotion, spark conversations, and revive the collective memories that cinema gifted us. Tentkotta invites participants to pause from the fast-paced present and relive the magic of the past, where stories mattered, emotions lingered, and cinema felt personal. It is a tribute to films that continue to live in our hearts, long after the screen fades to black.

fields.shortDescription: This campus-wide photographic treasure hunt challenges teams to solve automotive and mechanical clues. Participants must race to identify and capture specific objects or concepts across the college, combining fast thinking and teamwork in a competitive, m
fields.longDescription:
SAE's Click-n-Shift Adventure is a campus-wide photographic treasure hunt where teams of 2–4 members race to solve AUTOMOTIVE - themed pictorial clues hidden across the college. Each clue leads to a new location, a MECHANICAL concept, or an AUTOMOTIVE object you must spot, capture, or decode.
Fast thinking, teamwork, and sharp eyes win the day — all while exploring the campus in a fun, competitive, and MOTORSPORT - inspired adventure.

fields.shortDescription: The 20-Second Reel Challenge invites participants to create short videos documenting festival events. Judged on creativity and storytelling, winners are featured on Instagram, driving digital outreach and capturing the vibrant atmosphere of the fest.
fields.longDescription: The 20-Second Reel Challenge invites participants to document Vibrance and Pro-Show events across all four days through short-form video content. Following an initial briefing and theme reveal, participants curate, edit, and submit a single reel. Winning entries are featured on the official Instagram page, encouraging creative storytelling, consistent engagement, and digital outreach. The submissions will be based on the following criteria: Creativity & originality, Cinematic quality, Transitions & flow, Storytelling, Fest vibe capture, Overall impact.

fields.shortDescription: This F1 Esports event features iconic circuits like Paul Ricard and Monaco. Drivers compete solo or in teams using precision and strategy in a paddock-style format. Podium finishers earn rewards for showcasing elite sim-racing skills on legendary tracks.
fields.longDescription:
The Grand Prix de La Francophonie is a competitive F1 Esports event featuring iconic circuits from the French-speaking world. Drivers may compete solo or as duo teams, combining speed, precision, and strategy in a paddock-style format.
Participants choose one circuit to race:
🇫🇷 France – Paul Ricard: High-speed layout demanding clean lines and braking precision.
🇨🇦 Canada – Gilles Villeneuve: Fast, technical, and unforgiving with heavy braking zones.
🇧🇪 Belgium – Spa-Francorchamps: Historic, flowing circuit testing courage and control.
🇲🇨 Monaco – Circuit de Monaco: Ultra-technical street circuit with zero margin for error.
Duo teams represent a single entry among 10 teams in the paddock, emphasizing coordination and shared performance.
Exclusive rewards will be awarded to podium finishers and track time record holders.
The event showcases elite sim-racing skill across some of motorsport’s most legendary circuits.

fields.shortDescription: Join Haryana Hood for a vibrant cultural mela celebrating art and tradition. Enjoy pottery, mehendi, and painting stalls alongside fun games like gulel and darts. With lively music and club performances, this event captures the energetic spirit of Haryana
fields.longDescription: The cultural club Haryana Hood is organizing a vibrant mela celebrating art, tradition, and fun. The event will begin with the setup of colorful stalls, each offering a unique experience — from traditional pottery where visitors can try their hand at shaping clay, to creative mehendi and painting corners showcasing artistic talent. Alongside, exciting game stalls like gulel and darts will add a playful competitive spirit to the atmosphere. A lively music system will set the mood throughout the event, filling the air with energy and rhythm. Short performances by club members will keep the crowd entertained, adding a cultural flair to the celebration. Together, the combination of art, games, music, and performance will create a joyful and engaging experience, reflecting the vibrant spirit of Haryana and the enthusiasm of the students behind the event.

fields.shortDescription: This talent showcase invites students to display skills like dancing, singing, and magic. Open to individuals and groups, the event provides a platform for creative expression, allowing participants to engage the audience with unique artistic abilities.
fields.longDescription: Students can showcase their talents and skills, can include dance, singing, magic show. Can be individual as well as a group event

fields.shortDescription: Render X is a Blender workshop teaching 3D modeling and rendering. Beginners learn to create objects and apply lighting for realistic results. The session provides a strong foundation in design, allowing participants to produce unique digital outputs.
fields.longDescription:
Render X is a hands-on Blender workshop designed to introduce participants to the fundamentals of 3D modeling, texturing, lighting, and rendering. The session aims to provide a clear and practical understanding of Blender’s interface and essential tools, making it suitable for both beginners and those with basic experience in 3D design.

Participants will be guided step by step through the process of creating simple 3D objects and transforming them into visually appealing renders. The workshop will also cover key concepts such as camera setup, material application, and lighting techniques to enhance realism and visual quality. Emphasis will be placed on practical learning, enabling attendees to apply their skills to future projects with confidence.

Render X offers a supportive and interactive learning environment where participants can ask questions, experiment freely, and gain hands-on experience. By the end of the workshop, attendees will have a strong foundation in Blender and a rendered output they can showcase or build upon.

fields.shortDescription: Learn the art of light painting photography starting at 1:00 PM. This session covers camera settings and tools followed by a hands-on workshop at 2:00 PM. Create your own stylized long-exposure photos and take home a unique piece of art.
fields.longDescription:
The event kicks off at 1:00 PM with an introduction to the art of Light Painting Photography, where they’ll have a session to learn camera settings, light tools, and long-exposure techniques. 
Various kinds of techniques will be taught using vibrant and multicolored light sticks and some live demonstrations will be shown too. After the session, at 2:00 PM, participants will head over to take their very own personalized light painted pictures, featuring any stylized shape they want. They’ll walk away with a photo of their own, and the knowledge to make beautiful light paintings.

fields.shortDescription: This Lok Sabha simulation offers a realistic parliamentary debate on national issues. Guided by a moderator, participants represent members to practice public speaking and constitutional awareness, fostering critical thinking through structured dialogue.
fields.longDescription:
Lok Sabha Simulation,  Debate aeDemocracy is an interactive literary event that aims to provide students with a realistic experience of India’s parliamentary functioning. Participants will engage in a structured and safe debate on relevant social and national issues, following the official parliamentary mode of discussion. Each participant will represent a member of the Lok Sabha and present arguments, raise points, and respond to counter-views in a disciplined and democratic manner.

The session will be moderated by an experienced speaker, ensuring decorum, balanced participation, and meaningful dialogue throughout the debate. This event encourages students to develop critical thinking, public speaking, leadership, and constitutional awareness, while also promoting respectful disagreement and informed discussion.

The simulation is open to all students interested in politics, governance, and social issues. It offers a unique opportunity to understand the values of democracy beyond textbooks and actively participate in a vibrant exchange of ideas.

fields.shortDescription: Arcade Arena is a board game event featuring strategy challenges. Participants compete in teams or solo through mini-tournaments and timed rounds. The event promotes social interaction and logical thinking, offering a refreshing break with exciting prizes
fields.longDescription:
Arcade Arena is an engaging board game arcade room event designed to bring people together through strategy, teamwork, and fun. The space will be transformed into a lively gaming zone featuring a variety of classic and modern board games, ranging from quick party games to deep strategy-based challenges. Participants can choose their favorite games, form teams, or compete one-on-one in a friendly and welcoming environment.

The event encourages social interaction, logical thinking, and healthy competition while providing a refreshing break from digital screens. Special rounds, timed challenges, and mini-tournaments will add excitement and keep the energy high throughout the event. Prizes and recognition await top performers, making every game more thrilling.

Whether you are a board game enthusiast or a casual player, Arcade Arena offers the perfect platform to unwind, connect, and enjoy the timeless joy of board games. Roll the dice, plan your moves, and experience the fun of Arcade Arena.

fields.shortDescription: Experience the thrill of a Valorant tournament where teams go head-to-head in high-stakes tactical showdowns. This competitive event tests coordination and skill as players battle for victory, making it a must for gaming enthusiasts to show prowess.
fields.longDescription: It's a Valorant E-sport tournament. Each team go head to head for a thrilling valorant showdown

fields.shortDescription: Participate in various artistic activities including caricature and anime sketching. Enjoy a spin-the-wheel dare challenge, collaborative pair painting on mini canvases, and a fast-paced sketch and guess game. It is a perfect event for creative minds.
fields.longDescription: The event consists of many activities such as caricature and anime sketching followed by spin the wheel dare where one has to perform the dare specified in the wheel , then there is pair painting where in two individuals will be provided with  mini canvas to sketch or paint together and lastly we have a interesting game where one person would be given a word he/she has to sketch that within maybe 60 sec and the other has to guess it right . These are the activities that the club planning to conduct

fields.shortDescription: Compete in a 1v1 Clash Royale knockout tournament. Using either Classic or Mega Draft modes, players must demonstrate intense strategic thinking. This event brings tactical gaming to the forefront, proving strategy exists far beyond the realms of business
fields.longDescription: This event will be a knockout tournament where particpants will play 1v1 games on clash royale. Either classic 1v1 mode or mega draft mode will be enforced. This event promotes strategy beyond the realms of business.

fields.shortDescription: Celebrate traditional artistry at the Mehndi Maharani event. Featuring professional mehndi application and a curated handicraft stall, visitors can explore intricate designs and unique handmade products. Immerse yourself in a day of rich cultural creativi
fields.longDescription:
Event–Mehndi Maharani
Event brings a vibrant cultural experience with Mehndi Maharani, featuring a professional mehndi artist along with a beautifully curated handicraft stall. The stall offers intricate mehndi designs and unique handcrafted products that reflect traditional artistry. Visitors can enjoy live mehndi application, explore handmade items, and immerse themselves in rich cultural creativity throughout the day.

fields.shortDescription: Satyaneshi is a Bengali-themed treasure hunt that blends logic and cultural elements. Teams must solve mysteries and uncover hidden clues on a thrilling quest for the truth. This event rewards wit, wisdom, and teamwork in a race toward discovery.
fields.longDescription: Satyaneshi– The Quest for Truth is an engaging Bengali-themed treasure hunt that challenges participants to think, explore, and uncover hidden clues on a journey toward the truth. Blending mystery, logic, and cultural elements, the event encourages teamwork, observation, and problem-solving at every step. Each clue leads closer to the final discovery, making the experience both exciting and intellectually stimulating. Designed to spark curiosity and adventure, Satyaneshi offers participants a thrilling hunt where wit and wisdom are the keys to success.

fields.eventName: Campus Conspiracy: The Case That Wasn’t Supposed to Exist
fields.shortDescription: Become an investigator in Campus Conspiracy, a mystery-driven team event. Explore various locations, analyze clues, and uncover a complex narrative. Success depends on observation, teamwork, and sound reasoning to solve the strange campus situation.
fields.longDescription:
Campus Conspiracy is an immersive, mystery-driven team event where participants are drawn into a strange situation unfolding somewhere on campus. Teams step into the role of investigators and are given limited information to begin with. From there, they explore different locations, interact with various sources, and uncover pieces of information as the story slowly reveals itself.

Nothing is straightforward. Some details help, others confuse, and not everything can be trusted. Teams must observe carefully, connect dots, and discuss their findings before jumping to conclusions. 

The challenge lies in how well participants think, reason, and work together under uncertainty. The team that best understands the situation and supports their conclusion with strong reasoning emerges as the winner, making the event intriguing, engaging, and full of suspense.

fields.shortDescription: Experience a vibrant fusion of modern energy and Odishan tradition. This event features rhythmic jamming sessions, dynamic folk dance performances, and engaging community games. It is a celebration where contemporary trends meet the soul of Odisha.
fields.longDescription:
The proposed event will be a vibrant spectacle, perfectly blending modern energy with the timeless soul of Odisha. The atmosphere is set to ignite during pulsating jamming sessions, where contemporary tunes will fuse with the infectious, foot-tapping beats of Sambalpuri rhythms, creating an electric musical dialogue that resonates with every heart.

Following the music, the stage will come alive with dynamic dance performances. These acts will showcase a stunning duality, marrying the sophisticated grace of Odissi-inspired movements with the raw, high-energy vigor of local folk styles.

To ensure maximum engagement, we will feature iconic, eye-catching games and challenges. Designed to evoke the warmth and laughter of a lively 'Khati', these activities will spark friendly competition and community spirit. It promises to be an unforgettable celebration where tradition meets trend, ensuring every attendee experiences pure maja.

fields.shortDescription: Immerse yourself in a Japanese folklore-inspired escape room. Solve riddle-based mysteries using hidden clues to uncover a cursed ghost story. Eliminated players remain as spirits, subtly guiding or misdirecting those still in the game.
fields.longDescription:
The event is a Japanese folklore–inspired escape room presented as a story-driven mystery. Participants enter a dimly lit space where a cursed ghost story unfolds through a sequence of small, riddle-based games. Clues are hidden in simple objects such as plates, mirrors, and written fragments, with lighting used to shift mood and reveal information as the story progresses.

Players encounter in-game spirits and uncover pieces of a tragic narrative, gradually understanding the nature of the curse tied to the room. As the game advances, players are eliminated in stages. Eliminated players remain inside the experience as spirits, subtly influencing the remaining participants through misdirection, incomplete truths, or symbolic interaction.

fields.shortDescription: Inspired by the Reign of Terror, this strategic game tasks revolutionaries with identifying a hidden spy. Complete tasks to earn points and uncover clues while avoiding elimination. Success requires sharp deduction, teamwork, and strategic planning.
fields.longDescription:
Our event is inspired by Maximilien Robespierre’s “Reign of Terror,” where participants play revolutionaries attempting to overthrow him in a strategic team-based game. Each team consists of four members: one captain and three soldiers, among whom one is secretly a spy from Robespierre’s Ghost Agents tasked with eliminating the entire team.

The captain’s role is to identify and eliminate the spy within a fixed time limit. Only the captain can make this decision, based on clues provided and team discussions held only at designated checkpoints. Teams must also complete tasks to earn points, which are required to hand over the spy. Rule violations lead to point deductions, and repeated violations result in disqualification.

Teams are divided into allied and enemy factions, with some tasks requiring cooperation between allies. Enemy teams may eliminate one opposing member after earning sufficient points. National Guards mark safe zones where eliminations are prohibited. Winners are determined by points and successful identification of the spy.

fields.shortDescription: Join a vibrant treasure hunt centered on Tamil culture and literature. Teams decode riddles inspired by history and traditions, promoting teamwork and cultural awareness while navigating through challenging clues in an engaging, educational experience.
fields.longDescription: A Treasure Hunt event will be organized with clues based on Tamil culture and literature. Participants will decode riddles inspired by Tamil history, language, and traditions. The event will encourage teamwork, critical thinking, and cultural awareness while providing an engaging and enjoyable experience.

fields.shortDescription: In this shipwreck-themed game, participants wear character masks and argue why they should be saved or thrown overboard. The judge uses a "Shazam!" call to switch between shipwreck and anti-shipwreck modes, testing quick thinking and consistency.
fields.longDescription: Each participant is assigned a unique character and given a stick-face mask that brings the role to life. It starts off as a game of shipwreck. The goal is to convince the judge or audience why your character deserves to survive and be saved from the shipwreck. Participants are given a short time to speak, during which they must think quickly, stay in character, and present logical, emotional, or humorous arguments. When the judge calls out “Shazam!” or uses a buzzer, participants must switch gears to Anti-Shipwreck or switch back to shipwreck, depending on the call. In anti-shipwreck, participants must speak in character and present reasons explaining why they are the least suitable to survive the situation. The participant must stay true to their character throughout the game regardless of the stance they are arguing for.  Ultimately, the judge decides which characters “survive” and are handed the life jacket, and which are “thrown overboard”.

fields.shortDescription: Cinephiles can showcase their Kollywood expertise in this event hosted by Arignar Anna Tamil Mandram. Challenge yourself by decoding movies from images and identifying dialogues from memes across several fun, mind-bending rounds of entertainment.
fields.longDescription:
Decode movies from images
Find famous dialogues from memes

It’s an exciting opportunity for all the cinephiles to showcase their Kollywood knowledge expertise. An amazing set of rounds blended with more fun, entertainment, and mind-bending challenges hosted by Arignar Anna Tamil Mandram.

fields.shortDescription: Experience a custom-built laser tag system featuring club-designed guns and hit-detection vests. This event showcases applied electronics and engineering through 4-player matches in a modular arena, blending technical innovation with interactive gameplay.
fields.longDescription:
This event proposes the design and execution of a custom-built Laser Tag system developed entirely by the club. The scope includes fabrication of laser tag guns, wearable hit-detection vests, and a controlled arena setup. The system is designed to support 4-player matches per round, ensuring manageable hardware requirements, smooth game flow, and effective supervision.

Each player unit will consist of a laser emitter and a sensor-based vest to register valid hits, enabling real-time scoring and fair gameplay. The arena will be modular, allowing safe movement, obstacle placement, and controlled line-of-sight engagement. Match rules, timing, and scoring logic will be predefined to maintain consistency across rounds.

The event emphasizes hands-on engineering, system integration, and user interaction, while remaining scalable, safe, and cost-effective. This initiative aligns with the club’s objective of showcasing applied electronics, embedded systems, and event management through an interactive technical activity.

fields.shortDescription: PromptCraft is an AI-based challenge where participants translate ideas into words to recreate images or videos. Focusing on creativity over technical skill, it encourages experimentation and prompt engineering to guide AI toward imaginative results.
fields.longDescription:
PromptCraft is a creative, AI-based challenge where ideas matter more than technical skills. Participants are given a reference image, video concept, or a set of objects, and their task is to recreate or reinterpret it using AI through carefully written prompts. The challenge lies in how well you can translate an idea into words and guide the AI to generate an output that feels accurate, creative, and intentional.

There are no restrictions on style or imagination. Some may aim for close accuracy, while others may turn the same reference into something completely unexpected. PromptCraft is designed to be beginner-friendly and open to anyone curious about creativity and AI. It encourages experimentation, attention to detail, and thinking beyond the obvious.

fields.shortDescription: Test soccer skills in this individual challenge. Players must score goals from various angles in a DudePerfect-inspired setup. This affordable event is perfect for solo participants looking to showcase their shooting precision and accuracy.
fields.longDescription: DudePerfect Football Edition – A thrilling individual challenge where participants must shoot the football into the goal from different angles and positions. The registration fee is ₹49, making it a fun and skill-testing event for solo players.

fields.shortDescription: Therottam is a tournament-style game show testing quick thinking and teamwork. Teams tackle mini-games like AI word-guessing and treasure hunts to prove their creativity and speed, aiming to be crowned the ultimate champion.
fields.longDescription: Therottam is a game show event that combines quick thinking, teamwork, and out-of- the-box problem-solving to crown the ultimate champion of the arena. The event features multiple engaging mini-games, such as guessing a word from an Al-generated image and participating in a literary treasure hunt. Designed in a tournament-style format, teams compete across rounds, testing their creativity, strategy, and speed, until one winner emerges victorious.

fields.shortDescription: Participants take on the challenge of pitching ridiculous and convoluted products to a panel. The goal is to use persuasion and creativity to convince judges that these seemingly unusable items have real value and worth.
fields.longDescription: Participants are provided with a ridiculous, almost unusable product that is unnecessarily convoluted. They must pitch this product to a panel and convince them of its worth.

fields.shortDescription: Step into an investigator's shoes in this immersive murder mystery treasure hunt. Solve cryptic riddles and follow symbolic evidence across campus to identify which of the six suspects killed Detective Raghav Verma, reassessing truth with every clue found
fields.longDescription:
The Last Clue Bleeds is a live, story-driven treasure hunt blended with a murder mystery.
Detective Raghav Verma, a man feared and respected for his ruthless pursuit of justice, is found dead in his office. Six suspects. No direct interrogations. Only cryptic riddles, symbolic evidence, and hidden locations scattered across the campus.

Participants step into the shoes of investigators. Each riddle leads to a new location inspired by real-world criminal paradoxes across global cities. Every solved clue not only unlocks the next destination but also casts suspicion on a different suspect, forcing teams to constantly reassess the truth.

fields.shortDescription: Test your ability to think like the majority in this engaging team-based game. Participants guess the most popular responses to fun, relatable questions about college life and pop culture, earning points for consensus rather than factual accuracy.
fields.longDescription: The Crowd Says is an engaging, team-based informal event designed to test how well participants can think like the majority. Instead of focusing on correct or factual answers, the event challenges teams to guess the most popular responses that people are likely to give to a question. The questions are fun, relatable, and centered around college life, daily habits, pop culture, and common social situations, making it easy for students to connect and participate enthusiastically. Each team is given a limited time to discuss and present their answers, earning points based on how popular their responses are. The event encourages teamwork, quick thinking, and spontaneous decision-making, while also keeping the atmosphere light-hearted and entertaining. With active audience involvement, humorous moments, and friendly competition, The Crowd Says creates an energetic environment that appeals to both participants and spectators. It is an ideal event to bring students together and add excitement to the cultural lineup.

fields.shortDescription: UNLOCK-AI is a high-tension escape room experience where teams solve puzzles based on AI ethics and logic. Race against the clock to stop a rogue system, using teamwork and critical thinking to navigate through various levels of thrilling challenges.
fields.longDescription:
UNLOCK-AI is an immersive AI escape experience where teams race to stop a rogue system before it takes control.
Participants solve fast-paced puzzles based on real AI, ethics, and logic concepts.
High tension, teamwork, and learning—packed into one thrilling experience along with fun twists at each level.

fields.shortDescription: In this fast-paced online event, teams use AI tools to create original short films based entirely on prompts. From script to final cut, participants compete to showcase their visual storytelling and prompt engineering skills for various jury awards.
fields.longDescription:
Online Event - Promptwood Pictures is a fast-paced, laugh-friendly film-making event where teams create an original short movie (15 - 30 minutes) entirely using AI video generation tools (like Google Veo and similar platforms). From story idea to final cut, everything is driven by prompts: plot, characters, scenes, camera moves, voiceovers, sound, and even the poster. Participants will compete to turn wild concepts into watchable (and meme-worthy) films under a fixed time limit, learning the art of prompt engineering, visual storytelling, and creative iteration along the way.

Expect unexpected plot twists, surreal shots, and “how did the AI think of that?” moments. At the end, all films premiere on the big screen, followed by audience voting and jury awards—Best Story, Best Comedy, Best VFX, Best Twist, and the legendary “Most Chaotic Prompt.”

Bring your imagination; we’ll bring the pixels.

fields.shortDescription: Valorant is a competitive tactical shooter event where teams use strategy and precision. Testing communication and game sense, players must navigate intense matchups and defuse spikes to prove their skill and emerge as the winning team.
fields.longDescription:
Lock in, team up, and prove your aim.

VALORANT is our club’s competitive gaming event where strategy meets precision. Teams go head-to-head in intense tactical shooter matchups, testing communication, game sense, and clutch potential under pressure. Every round counts, every decision matters — from agent selection to the final spike defuse.

Whether you’re here to dominate the bracket or experience the thrill of competitive play, this event brings together gamers who respect the grind, the strategy, and the spirit of fair competition.

Only skill survives.
Only one team wins.

fields.shortDescription: Eco Shark Tank is a sustainability pitch-thon where students present innovative environmental solutions. Participants pitch to judges and a live audience, who use mock currency to invest in the most feasible and impactful green business ideas.
fields.longDescription: Eco Shark Tank is a sustainability-focused pitch-thon where students present innovative ideas addressing environmental and social challenges. Participants can register in teams and will be given prior time to prepare their pitches. On the day of the event, teams will pitch their solutions to a panel and live audience within a fixed time limit. Each pitch will be followed by a short Q&A session to assess feasibility, impact, and innovation. To encourage audience engagement, attendees will be given mock currency to invest in the ideas they find most promising. The final winners will be determined based on the total “funding” received along with judges’ evaluation. The event aims to promote entrepreneurial thinking, sustainability awareness, and problem-solving skills among students in an interactive way.

fields.shortDescription: Experience a high-energy, Punjabi-style Tambola featuring loud calls, desi humor, and nonstop crowd interaction. This festive take on the classic game relies on luck and spirit, offering surprises and quick wins for every participant involved.
fields.longDescription:
Get ready for a high-energy Punjabi twist on the classic Tambola game. This isn’t a silent, boring numbers session — it’s loud calls, desi humour, unexpected twists, and nonstop crowd interaction.

Every round brings new surprises, quick wins, and moments where luck decides everything. Whether you’re playing to win or just there for the vibe, the energy stays high and the fun doesn’t drop for a second.

Come with friends, shout your numbers, flex your luck, and enjoy an evening where numbers aren’t just called — they’re celebrated.

Luck shows up once.
Make sure you’re there when it does.

fields.shortDescription: Sol Vilaiyatu is a word game event for teams to enhance their vocabulary and reasoning. Participants compete in rounds of clue-based guessing and word unscrambling, sharpening their language skills and logical thinking through collaborative play.
fields.longDescription: Sol Vilaiyatu is a word game event designed to enhance vocabulary, reasoning, and teamwork. Teams of 2–3 members will participate in two rounds: one involves guessing a word from clues, and the other involves unscrambling a jumbled word. This event helps students sharpen their language skills and logical thinking.

fields.shortDescription: This debate event invites students to argue for or against key environmental and sustainability topics. Participants are evaluated on their clarity, relevance, and speaking skills as they present their points and engage in quick rebuttals.
fields.longDescription: This is a debate event conducted by the where students discuss and argue on topics related to the environment and sustainability. Participants will speak either in support of or against a given topic, such as climate change, pollution, or sustainable living. Each participant will get a fixed amount of time to present their points, followed by a short rebuttal or response. Judges will evaluate the participants based on how clearly they express their ideas, the relevance of their points, and their speaking skills.

fields.shortDescription: Participants spin a wheel to select a Sustainable Development Goal and then brainstorm a related business idea within a set timeframe. This activity encourages quick thinking and creative entrepreneurship focused on global sustainability challenges.
fields.longDescription: Participants spin a wheel of Sustainable Development Goals. They get a specified amount of a time in a breakout group to brainstorm a business idea linked to that goal.

fields.shortDescription: Component Chaos is a hands-on challenge where teams build working circuits from a random set of electronic parts without instructions. It tests practical knowledge and creativity under pressure, requiring participants to think like engineers.
fields.longDescription: Component Chaos is a hands-on electronics challenge where participants are given a sealed box containing a random set of electronic components. With no circuit diagram or prior instructions, teams must analyze the components, understand their purpose, and design a working circuit within the given time. This event tests participants’ practical electronics knowledge, problem-solving skills, teamwork, and creativity under pressure. The goal is not just to make a circuit work, but to think like an engineer and bring logic out of chaos.

fields.shortDescription: This board-game inspired event teaches participants the fundamentals of stock trading and asset management. By making strategic financial decisions, players learn about investment, risk assessment, and the importance of ethical business practices.
fields.longDescription:
A board-game inspired activity where participants trade stocks, manage assets, 
and make strategic financial decisions. This will help them understand the basics 
of investment, risk, and ethical business decisions.

fields.shortDescription: Strongest Human is a powerlifting competition testing raw strength across three core lifts: Squat, Bench Press, and Deadlift. Open to all, it features weight categories and judges athletes on their maximum strength and proper lifting technique.
fields.longDescription:
STRONGEST HUMAN  VITC
Strongest Human  VITC is a powerlifting competition conducted by the Fitness Club, VIT Chennai, designed to test raw strength, discipline, and mental grit. The event features the three core powerlifting lifts — Squat, Bench Press, and Deadlift.

The competition is open to both internal and external participants and will be conducted under different weight categories to ensure fair and competitive lifting. Athletes will be judged based on maximum strength and proper lifting technique across all three lifts.

This event celebrates true power, consistency, and the spirit of competitive fitness.

fields.shortDescription: This interactive general knowledge quiz covers diverse topics like science, history, and pop culture across multiple rounds of increasing difficulty. Students compete individually or in teams to showcase their knowledge and win based on total scores.
fields.longDescription: Fun and interactive general knowledge quiz where students answer questions from a wide range of topics such as current affairs, basic science, history, sports, pop culture, and the environment. The quiz will be conducted in multiple rounds with increasing difficulty to keep it interesting and engaging. Participants can take part individually or in teams. The event focuses on learning while having fun and encourages healthy competition among students. Winners will be decided based on the total scores at the end of all rounds.

fields.eventName: Three to Tango | Sketch •  Guess • Design
fields.shortDescription: In this unique team challenge, one member describes a mystery object, the second deciphers the clue, and the third replicates it using CAD or drawing. This reverse Pictionary tests communication and design skills against the clock.
fields.longDescription:
One describes, one guesses, one designs—can your team recreate the object before time runs out?

Pictionary but make it UNO reverse! 
Teams of three take on the challenge. One member describes a mystery object—without saying its name. Another cracks the clue, while the third races against time to sketch or replicate it using CAD/Drawing.

fields.clubName: IEEE EDS Student Branch Chapter VIT Chennai
fields.shortDescription: Navigate a room filled with laser paths and LDR sensors. Participants must reach the exit without hitting beams while collecting specific objects. Any disturbance or sensor activation results in faults or disqualification from the challenge.
fields.longDescription:
The event consists of a room arranged with multiple laser paths monitored using LDR sensors. A single participant enters the room and must cross from the starting point to the exit without interrupting any laser beam. Any disturbance detected by the sensors will be counted as a fault.

In addition to navigating through the lasers, a few objects are placed at different locations inside the room. The participant is required to collect or grab these items while moving through the space, without triggering any laser detection. Touching a laser or activating a sensor will result in disqualification.

fields.shortDescription: Organized by the Fitness Club, Mr. Physique is a premier bodybuilding event focusing on muscle definition, symmetry, and stage presence. It invites participants to showcase their training excellence and discipline while promoting health and fitness.
fields.longDescription:
Mr. Physique is a flagship bodybuilding competition organized by the Fitness Club to celebrate strength, aesthetics, discipline, and dedication to fitness. The event provides a competitive platform for both internal college students and external participants from other institutions and fitness communities to showcase their physique and training excellence.

The competition focuses on overall physique development, including muscle definition, symmetry, proportion, conditioning, and stage presence. Participants will be judged by a qualified panel following standard bodybuilding evaluation criteria to ensure fairness and professionalism.

Through Mr. Physique, the Fitness Club aims to promote a strong fitness culture on campus, encourage healthy competition, and inspire individuals to strive for physical and mental excellence. The event also offers participants valuable exposure, recognition, and competitive experience.

fields.shortDescription: In this high-stakes one-day event, ten teams compete in a simulated IPL auction. Participants must strategically bid on players to assemble the strongest possible cricket squad, with the most well-built team claiming ultimate victory.
fields.longDescription: IPL Auction is a 1 day event where multiple teams compete together split up as 10 teams in a single venue, bidding on IPL Players. The one with the best team built wins the competition.

fields.shortDescription: Participants follow a trail of clues leading to various checkpoints. At each location, they must complete health-related tasks to progress. This hunt combines fitness with wellness awareness, rewarding the fastest team to reach the final goal.
fields.longDescription: The  Hunt begins at a starting point where participants receive their first clue. Each clue leads them to a new location, where they must complete a health-related task to earn the next clue. This continues through multiple checkpoints, combining fun with fitness and wellness awareness. The participant or team that completes all tasks and reaches the final destination first wins the hunt.

fields.shortDescription: Minecraft BedWars is a strategic multiplayer game where teams must protect their own bed while attempting to destroy their opponents'. Players gather resources and upgrade gear to survive, with the last team standing declared the winner.
fields.longDescription: Minecraft BedWars is a multiplayer game mode where teams compete to protect their bed while trying to destroy opponents’ beds.
